sentences.arabic: اسْتَأْجَرْتُ دَرَّاجَةً هَوَائِيَّةً لِأَتَجَوَّلَ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Iznajmio sam bicikl za obilazak starog dijela grada.
sentences.translationEn: I rented a bicycle to tour the old part of the city.

sentences.arabic: دَفَعْتُ أُجْرَةَ سَاعَتَيْنِ وَأَخَذَ الرَّجُلُ مِنِّي بِطَاقَةَ الْهُوِيَّةِ ضَمَانًا.
sentences.translation: Platio sam za dva sata najma i čovjek je uzeo moju ličnu kartu kao jamstvo.
sentences.translationEn: I paid for two hours and the man took my ID card as a deposit.

sentences.arabic: رَكِبْتُ فِي شَوَارِعَ ضَيِّقَةٍ وَزِقَاقَاتٍ جَمِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Vozio sam uskim ulicama i lijepim uličicama.
sentences.translationEn: I rode through narrow streets and beautiful alleyways.

sentences.arabic: وَقَفْتُ أَمَامَ الْمَبَانِي التَّارِيخِيَّةِ وَأَخَذْتُ صُوَرًا كَثِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Zaustavljao sam se ispred historijskih zgrada i mnogo fotografirao.
sentences.translationEn: I stopped in front of historical buildings and took many photos.

sentences.arabic: أَعَدْتُ الدَّرَّاجَةَ فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُحَدَّدِ وَشَعَرْتُ بِسَعَادَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Vratio sam bicikl na vrijeme i osjećao se jako sretno.
sentences.translationEn: I returned the bicycle on time feeling very happy.
